description_long: This is a sealed package of Gibs Pasta Shell Macaroni, presented in a vibrant red plastic bag with a clear window on the front displaying the shell-shaped pasta inside. The front of the package features a large yellow and white 'PASTA SHELL MACARONI' label, surrounded by decorative leaf graphics and the Gibs brand logo at the top. The back of the package is densely covered with nutritional information, cooking instructions, and recipes in both English and another language, along with various certification symbols. The sides of the package are narrow and show the seam of the bag, with some text and partial views of the pasta visible through the transparent section. The bag appears to be filled with air to cushion the pasta, giving it a slightly puffed appearance. The overall look is clean, commercial, and designed for retail display.
description: A red plastic bag of Gibs Pasta Shell Macaroni with a clear window showing shell-shaped pasta and detailed labeling on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Gibs brand, 'PASTA SHELL MACARONI' label, decorative leaves, and a clear window revealing the pasta inside.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the bag, seam, and partial pasta visibility through the transparent section.
description_view_2: Back view displaying extensive nutritional information, cooking instructions, recipes, and certification symbols.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a similar narrow profile, seam, and partial labeling visible.
attribute_labeling: Front: 'PASTA SHELL MACARONI', Gibs logo, decorative leaves; Back: nutritional facts, cooking instructions, recipes, certifications, multilingual text.
